description:
Legal record (#8) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on f. 3r of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated in the final third of Shevat 5443 AM, which is 1683 CE. 

(#8) Acknowledgment of a payment received toward renovations of houses "facing Darb Talmud Torah" (presumably in the Jewish quarter of Cairo). More specifically, Moshe Villasid receives 3,000 medin from Yisraʾel Barūkhʾel and his sister Dona (דונא). The entry notes that the funds are for "the construction and repairs of the bolts/bars (ברחי) in the houses" (probably locks in this context). MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
